gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward with a big smile, opens arms wide, and looks joyfully at the class while announcing today's lesson
a person tilts their head slightly, leans forward, and softly gestures with one hand as if inviting answers from the learners
a tutor holds both hands out in front, palms up, and mimics stacking blocks while explaining the addition of five and five
a person raises both hands and moves fingers in a counting motion while encouraging everyone to count the blocks together
a tutor claps hands together gently, smiles widely, and beckons the learners to use their fingers as they start the hands-on activity
a person lifts one hand dramatically and mimics shouting, looking excitedly at the class, urging them to shout the answer out loud
a tutor raises both arms in celebration and smiles brightly, emphasizing that five plus five equals ten with enthusiastic gestures
a person steps slightly back, nods encouragingly, and gestures forward as if inviting more practice and confidence in their skills
